howItWorks.intro: This raised bed soil calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Volume
rules.explanation: Length times width times depth converted to feet.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How deep should a raised bed be?
faq.a: At least 6 inches for most vegetables, 12+ inches for root crops and better drainage.
A common mix is 60% topsoil, 30% compost, and 10% perlite or vermiculite.
